title: Conjure Skill YAML Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block at the top of .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md

name.description: Kebab-case; 2-40 chars; must match the parent directory name.

description.description: One sentence; names concrete trigger user phrases. Bad if shorter than 30 chars.

allowed-tools.description: Optional tool allowlist for this skill's invocations.

model.description: Optional model override for this skill.

memory.description: Scope of memory inheritance when skill body is loaded.
